comment.body:
my take on the close:
- PPl closing out Feb 28th puts pushes SPY up
- Charm flips to supportive above 5900 (can see it on options depth), this makes sense as the ITM puts were getting closed
- negative gamma above spot gets exacerbated based on above
- You get this kind of rampup

comment.body: Curious what Alma says. But my read is as follows. After price stalled in the 5850-5870 range and stayed there for some time, short positions were slowly but surely unwound. This pushed the indices higher, despite the suppressive flows (that could actually be seen on the way up to 5910. Once that level flipped, the charm helped kick start the move which finally squeezed out the (late) shorts in the last 15 minutes...

comment.body:
Today's premarket post was free, opened. You can share it on twitter with your gains if you listened to my bottom call, and also you can show the indicators, as you wish. :))
It helps to grow the community. Too much desinformations out-there.
(I must admit that I was wrong with the Thrusday bottom call in the weekend post, it was delayed one day. But again, we owned this tape on the call side well, and I told you gamma squeeze gonna happen)
...
I was in call with OptionsDepth developer team today. 
I will make a video walkthrough on their site. And they will give me a link that gives you some cheaper price. You can use that, so you save some monthly fee via that link.
They offered me this as they said to me, that they see I keep recommending their site and they wanted to give me something in reverse. :)) They are nice plp
...
I will answer some Qs but definitely not everything. Later this weekend. 
I'm not alone this night ;))
